titleStmt.title: SII 18.60: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 60. (B.K. No. 153 of 1932-33.) MALLŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 970, Sarvadhāri, Pushya śu. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1048, December 11, Sunday f.d.t. ·83. The Saṁkramaṇa, however, fell on Saturday, the 24th December.

It states that when Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍarāyarasa was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand and Sāntaiḷge Thousand, Barmadēva's son Kumāra Jōmadēvarasa, who was governing Bāsavura Hundred-and-forty, went to Mallavura and made a grant of land to the god of that place. The gift was entrusted to Tribhuvanasiṅga-jīya. The composer of the record is described as being well-versed in all Śāstras. The record is damaged at places.

It may be noted in this connection that, in No. 69 below, Jōmadēvarasa is called the son of Chāvuṇḍarāya. But in No. 73, Barmadēva is stated to be the brother of Chāvuṇḍarāya. It is possible that in the present record Barmadēva is mistakenly stated to be his son. In No. 69, Jōmadēvarasa is called the son of Chāvuṇḍarāya perhaps because he was the son of the brother of Chāvuṇḍarāya. This practice is not unusual in the Kannaḍa country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© pratyakṣavastuviṣayāya jagadhdhitāya viśvastitipraḷeyasaṁbhavakāraṇāya sa
rvvātmanē vijitakōpamanōpa vāya stu nyaṁ namaḥ tricu vanaprabhavē pāmayaḥ . Read bhaReadtuRead bhyaṁReadbhuRead śivāya
ślōka . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .The lettervē is written below the line.
visuddhajñānadēhāya trivēdhīdivyacakṣuṣē śrīyaprāptinimityāya namaḥ sōmārddha dhāriṇē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vija
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamāca(ṁ)ndrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ banavāsipuravarēsva
raṁ mahālakṣmīvaraprasādaṁ tyāgavinōdanāyadācāryyanasahāyasauryyaṁ ga(ṁ) ṇḍara ga(ṁ)
ṇḍa ga(ṁ)ṇḍabhēru(ṁ)ṇḍaṁ mūṟurāyāsthānakalibirudama(ṁ)ṇḍalikabirudavriṣabhasa(ṁ) kara ripunri
pabhayaṁkaraṁ kaligaḷa mogada kai pratyakṣavikramādityaṁ birudarādityaṁ śrīmanmahāma (ṁ)ṇḍaḷē
svaraṁ cāvuṇḍarāyarasarbbanavāsipannicchāsiramuṁ sā(ṁ)ntaḷige sāyira(ṁ) mumaṁ paḍedu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷuttamire . kanda . śrīramaṇīyaṁ sale vākśrīramaṇīyaṁ sama
stanijabhujavijayaśrīramaṇīyaṁ kīrtiśrīramaṇīyaṁ dharitriyoḷ rāyanripa . vṛtta .
muḷisiṁdaṁ rāyabhūpaṁ nijabhujavijayōgrāsiyaṁ kirttudattaltuḷkalkaṁbhōdhi sēsaṁ peḷaṟalamarara
ḷkōḍalāsāgajēndraṁ taḷaral beḷkalnelaṁ hu bagevanitu mahākṣōpamāyteṁdo ḍāvaṁ seḷevaṁ nindāṁpanāvaṁ
samaradoḷidiroḷmīṟe mārkkoḷvanāva . tattanuja . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ biru
dabammarakkasaṁ naralōkajagadaḷaṁ kaligaḷa gaṇḍaṁ kaliyugamallaṁ kaligaṇḍasarabhabhēruṇḍaṁ rāyana siṁga .
vritta . nuḍidaḍe rāvarēsu maṟevokkaḍe kāvane vajrapaṁjaraṁ kuḍuvaḍe Ānta kaiyuḍuga dīvudu hastagataṁ ra
ṇāgradoḷtoḍaraṟdane mārigormmāri murāri surāri bakāriye(ṁ)ndoḍārmmi ḍukuvarārkkaḍaṁguvaridi
rccuvarārssale barmadēvanaṁ . tattaneya . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāma(ṁ)
ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ Ayyana gandhavāraṇaṁ Arimaṇḍalikakomarasīsakēsakarttanakattari yiḍu
varādityaṁ hayavatsarājaṁ nītinārāyaṇaṁ mūṟurāyāsthānakalibirudamaṇḍa
likakomaragajakēsari śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ komūraṁ jōmadēvarasarbbasa vura 140
maṁ sarvvābhyaṁntarasiddhiyināḷuttamire . vritta . karakararasmigoḍḍida tamaṁ pa vanaṁge ghanāghanaughasīReadkha.
karamanalaṁge kānanamaḷukkeya vajrahatakke beṭṭugaḷ harige madaddibhapratati jōyi
yadēvana raudramappa durddharataravārigaṁ praḷeyakālada mārigamāṁpa gaṇḍarār [.]
kanda . muntiṭṭaḍiyaṁ dhuradoḷ pintiḍadidu bīrama ®paradaṟpōpantīvanenipa cāgaṁ sa(ṁ)ntatamadēṁ
jōmadēvanoḷsahajaguṇaṁ . svasti samastavasumatītaḷakhyātaṁ jīmūtavāhanānva
yaprasūtaṁ bandhujanakamaḷinīrājahaṁsa barmmadēvanaṁkakāṟa śrīmat nelliya
mmarasa bāsavuraṁ 140 rkkaṁ nārggāvuṇḍatanaṁ geyye . svasti śrīmanmahāma(ṁ)ṇḍa ḷēsvaraṁ ko
māraṁ jōmadēvarasarmmalavurakke bijayaṁ geydu sakavarṣa 970 neya sarvvadhārisaṁva
tsara puṣya su 5 mi Ādityavāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntti parvvanimittamalliya ka
vēśvaradēvargge khaṇḍaṟpuṭita gandhadhūpa nivēdyakkeṁdu tribhuvanasiṁgajīyargge dhārā pūrvvakaṁ bi
ṭṭa gaḻde kaggeṟeya keḷage mūlasthānada dēgulakke kamma 35 Ūriṁ paḍu
mādiyaṇnageṟeya keḷage gaḻde taḍasūra sīme
raṁ kisumatta matta 3 Aṁtu kisumatta 13 rāja
yiṁ mūḍa bīcagāvuṇḍa ḍagaṇa bīdiye mēreyāge maneya nivēsaṇa 20
yintī dharmmama ḷisidavaru vāraṇāsi prayāge tīrtthadal pannirvvaru
brāhmaṇargge panneraḍu kavileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakku . yī dharmmamanaḷidōṁ
vāraṇāsi prayāgeyargghyatīrtthaṁgaḷa lpannirvvaru brāhmaṇaraṁ panneraḍu kavileymanaḷida paṁ
camahāpātakanakku . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvariṣa śaha
śrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya
yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētunru pāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanī
yō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētān bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . na viṣaṁ vi
ṣamityāhurddēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ kanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ . svasti samastatarkkādisā
strapārāvārapāragaṁ vādirudraṁ vādībhamastakanakhāsphāḷanakisōrakēsari vādi mahāraṇyadavadaha
naṁ mādhavabhaṭṭagharaṭpaṁ vādībhasiṁhasarabhavādirājaṁ mukhamudra nayana sā pa
ṇḍitargaḷa kāḷapāsa vādirudraguṇa nāmāṁkitarappa śrīmallakuḷīsapaṇḍitara cavayyaṁ ma
llavurada yeṁṭu gāvuṇḍagaḷa besadiṁ baredaṁ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
svasti śrīmat jōmarasara garuḍaṁ rebbayyanāyakaṁ
munduṁbara peṁḍatigaṇḍa baṇṭara bāvaṁ Āḷiṁ munniṟiThe continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
